raw_continuation_text:
Step 3: ((🪨 ⊕ 🪬) ⊕ (🪬 ⊕ 🪨)) = (🪨 ⊕ 🪬) ⊕ 🪬    [by ⊕ table]
Step 4: (🪨 ⊕ 🪬) ⊕ 🪬 = 🪨 ⊕ 🪬    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: 🪨 ⊕ 🪬 = 🪆    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🪆}

Step 3: (🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊕ 🪵)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ 🥟   [by associativity]
Step 4: (🥟 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ 🥟 = 🥟 ⊕ (🪵 ⊕ 🥟)   [by commutativity]
Step 5: 🥟 ⊕ (🪵 ⊕ 🥟) = 🥟 ⊕ 🥟   [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: 🥟 ⊕ 🥟 = 🪵   [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🪵}

Step 4: (🪸 ⊗ inv(🪸)) = (🪸 ⊕ 🪸) ⊕ inv(🪸)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 5: (🪸 ⊕ 🪸) ⊕ inv(🪸) = 🧲 ⊕ inv(🪸)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: 🧲 ⊕ inv(🪸) = 🧲 ⊕ 🧲    [by inv]
Step 7: 🧲 ⊕ 🧲 = 🪆    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🪆}

Step 5: (🧿 ⊗ inv(🫧)) = (🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ inv(🫧)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: (🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ inv(🫧) = 🪨 ⊕ inv(🫧)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: 🪨 ⊕ inv(🫧) = 🪨 ⊕ 🪤    [by inv]
Step 8: 🪨 ⊕ 🪤 = 🫧    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🫧}

Step 4: (🪣 ⊕ (inv(🧊) ⊕ inv(🧊))) = (🪣 ⊕ (🪼 ⊕ 🪼))    [by inv]
Step 5: (🪣 ⊕ (🪼 ⊕ 🪼)) = (🪣 ⊕ 🪼)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🪣 ⊕ 🪼) = 🧊    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🧊}

Step 4: (inv(🪺) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙))) = (🍄 ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙)))    [by inv]
Step 5: (🍄 ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙))) = (🍄 ⊕ 🐙)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🍄 ⊕ 🐙) = 🍄    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🍄}

Step 5: inv((🪼 ⊗ 🧄)) = inv((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🧄)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🧄) = inv(🧄 ⊕ 🧄) ⊕ inv(🧄)    [by distribution property]
Step 7: inv(🧄 ⊕ 🧄) ⊕ inv(🧄) = inv(🪣) ⊕ inv(🧄)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: inv(🪣) ⊕ inv(🧄) = 🧄 ⊕ 🪆    [by transformation "inv"]
Step 9: 🧄 ⊕ 🪆 = 🪼    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🪼}

Step 5: inv((🧲 ⊗ 🪆)) = inv(( (🧲 ⊕ 🪆) ⊕ 🧲 ))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv(( (🧲 ⊕ 🪆) ⊕ 🧲 )) = inv(🌵 ⊕ 🧲)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: inv(🌵 ⊕ 🧲) = inv(🌵) ⊕ inv(🧲)    [by distribution property]
Step 8: inv(🌵) ⊕ inv(🧲) = 🧲 ⊕ 🪨    [by inv]
Step 9: 🧲 ⊕ 🪨 = 🪆    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🪆}

Step 5: inv((🪺 ⊗ 🪤)) = inv(inv(🪺 ⊕ 🪤))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv(inv(🪺 ⊕ 🪤)) = inv(🫐)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: inv(🫐) = 🪺    [by inv]

\boxed{🪺}

Step 4: (🍄 ⊕ (🪆 ⊗ inv(🪵))) = (🍄 ⊕ (inv(🪆) ⊕ inv(🪵)))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 5: (🍄 ⊕ (inv(🪆) ⊕ inv(🪵))) = (🍄 ⊕ (🪵 ⊕ 🪆))    [by inv]
Step 6: (🍄 ⊕ (🪵 ⊕ 🪆)) = (🍄 ⊕ 🍄)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🍄 ⊕ 🍄) = 🪨    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🪨}

Step 5: ((🪻 ⊕ 🫧) ⊗ 🫧) = ((🪻 ⊕ 🪻) ⊕ 🫧)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: ((🪻 ⊕ 🪻) ⊕ 🫧) = (🪻 ⊕ 🫧) ⊕ 🫧    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪻 ⊕ 🫧) ⊕ 🫧 = 🧲 ⊕ 🫧    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: 🧲 ⊕ 🫧 = 🧊    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🧊}

Step 4: ((🦔 ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🫑)) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = ((inv((🦔 ⊕ 🫑)) ⊕ inv(🪼))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 5: ((inv((🦔 ⊕ 🫑)) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = ((inv(🪸) ⊕ inv(🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: ((inv(🪸) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = (🫑 ⊕ 🦔)    [by inv]
Step 7: (🫑 ⊕ 🦔) = 🪸    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🪸}

Step 5: (🪵 ⊗ inv(inv(🫧))) = ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ inv(inv(🫧)))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ inv(inv(🫧))) = (🪵 ⊕ inv(inv(🫧)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪵 ⊕ inv(inv(🫧))) = (🪵 ⊕ inv(inv(🫧)))    [no change]
Step 8: (🪵 ⊕ inv(inv(🫧))) = (🪵 ⊕ inv(inv(🫧)))    [no change]
Step 9: (🪵 ⊕ inv(inv(🫧))) = (🪵 ⊕ inv(inv(🫧)))    [no change]
Step 10: (🪵 ⊕ inv(inv(🫧))) = (🪵 ⊕ (inv(inv(🫧))))    [no change]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊕ (inv(inv(🫧)))) = (🪵 ⊕ 🐙)    [by inv transformation]
Step 12: (🪵 ⊕ 🐙) = 🫧    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🫧}

Step 5: inv((🧊 ⊗ 🧿)) = inv((🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧊)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv((🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧊) = inv(🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ inv(🧊)    [by inv distribution]
Step 7: inv(🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ inv(🧊) = inv(🧊) ⊕ inv(🧊)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: inv(🧊) ⊕ inv(🧊) = 🧿 ⊕ 🧶    [by inv]
Step 9: 🧿 ⊕ 🧶 = 🧶    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🧶}

Step 6: (🐌 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ inv(🫑))) = (🐌 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ 🪨))    [by inv]
Step 7: (🐌 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ 🪨)) = (🐌 ⊗ inv((🧊 ⊕ 🪨)))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 8: (🐌 ⊗ inv((🧊 ⊕ 🪨))) = (🐌 ⊗ 🐌)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: (🐌 ⊗ 🐌) = inv(🐌 ⊕ 🐌)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 10: inv(🐌 ⊕ 🐌) = inv(🐌)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: inv(🐌) = 🧊    [by inv]

\boxed{🧊}

Step 4: (inv(🌵) ⊗ inv(🧲)) = (🪣 ⊗ 🧄)    [by inv]
Step 5: (🪣 ⊗ 🧄) = inv(🪣 ⊕ 🧄)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv(🪣 ⊕ 🧄) = inv(🧲)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: inv(🧲) = 🧄    [by inv]

\boxed{🧄}

Step 5: (🪸 ⊗ (🪩 ⊕ 🍄)) = ((🪸 ⊕ 🪩) ⊕ 🪸)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: ((🪸 ⊕ 🪩) ⊕ 🪸) = (🪩 ⊕ 🪸)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪩 ⊕ 🪸) = 🪸    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🪸}

Step 4: (inv(🌵) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (🥟 ⊕ inv(inv(🥟)))    [by transformation inv]
Step 5: (🥟 ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (🥟 ⊕ 🐌)    [by transformation inv]
Step 6: (🥟 ⊕ 🐌) = 🐌    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🐌}

Step 5: ((🪩 ⊕ 🪼) ⊗ 🪩) = (🫑 ⊕ (🪩 ⊕ 🪩)) ⊗ 🪩    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: (🫑 ⊕ (🪩 ⊕ 🪩)) ⊗ 🪩 = (🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊗ 🪩    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊗ 🪩 = 🪼 ⊗ 🪩    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: 🪼 ⊗ 🪩 = (🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🪩    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 9: (🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🪩 = 🪩 ⊕ 🪩    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: 🪩 ⊕ 🪩 = 🫑    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🫑}

Step 5: (🦩 ⊛ (inv(🪭) ⊕ inv(🧁))) = (🦩 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🪨))    [by inv]
Step 6: (🦩 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🪨)) = inv((🦩 ⊗ (🧁 ⊕ 🪨)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: inv((🦩 ⊗ (🧁 ⊕ 🪨))) = inv(inv(🦩) ⊗ inv(🧁 ⊕ 🪨))    [by inv(x ⊕ y) = inv(x) ⊕ inv(y)]
Step 8: inv(inv(🦩) ⊗ inv(🧁 ⊕ 🪨)) = inv(🧊 ⊗ (inv(🧁) ⊕ inv(🪨)))    [by inv]
Step 9: inv(🧊 ⊗ (inv(🧁) ⊕ inv(🪨))) = inv(🧊 ⊗ (🪨 ⊕ 🦩))    [by inv]
Step 10: inv(🧊 ⊗ (🪨 ⊕ 🦩)) = inv(inv(🧊) ⊗ inv(🪨 ⊕ 🦩))    [by inv(x ⊗ y) = inv(x) ⊗ inv(y)]
Step 11: inv(inv(🧊) ⊗ inv(🪨 ⊕ 🦩)) = inv(🪭 ⊗ inv(🪨 ⊕ 🦩))    [by inv]
Step 12: inv(🪭 ⊗ inv(🪨 ⊕ 🦩)) = inv(🪭 ⊗ (inv(🪨) ⊕ inv(🦩)))    [by inv(x ⊕ y) = inv(x) ⊕ inv(y)]
Step 13: inv(🪭 ⊗ (inv(🪨) ⊕ inv(🦩))) = inv(🪭 ⊗ (🦩 ⊕ 🧊))    [by inv]
Step 14: inv(🪭 ⊗ (🦩 ⊕ 🧊)) = inv(inv(🪭) ⊗ inv(🦩 ⊕ 🧊))    [by inv(x ⊕ y) = inv(x) ⊕ inv(y)]
Step 15: inv(inv(🪭) ⊗ inv(🦩 ⊕ 🧊)) = 🧁 ⊗ inv(🦩 ⊕ 🧊)    [by inv]
Step 16: 🧁 ⊗ inv(🦩 ⊕ 🧊) = 🧁 ⊗ (inv(🦩) ⊕ inv(🧊))    [by inv(x ⊕ y) = inv(x) ⊕ inv(y)]
Step 17: 🧁 ⊗ (inv(🦩) ⊕ inv(🧊)) = 🧁 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ 🪭)    [by inv]
Step 18: 🧁 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ 🪭) = (🧁 ⊗ 🧊) ⊕ (🧁 ⊗ 🪭)    [by inv(x ⊕ y) = inv(x) ⊕ inv(y)]
Step 19: (🧁 ⊗ 🧊) ⊕ (🧁 ⊗ 🪭) = 🪨 ⊕ 🪭    [by ⊗ table]
Step 20: 🪨 ⊕ 🪭 = 🧁    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🧁}

Step 6: (🪻 ⊛ ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ 🐙)) = (🪻 ⊛ (🪵 ⊕ 🐙))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪻 ⊛ (🪵 ⊕ 🐙)) = inv((🪻 ⊕ (🪵 ⊕ 🐙)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: inv((🪻 ⊕ (🪵 ⊕ 🐙))) = inv(🪻) ⊕ inv(🪵 ⊕ 🐙)    [by distribution property of inv]
Step 9: inv(🪻) ⊕ inv(🪵 ⊕ 🐙) = 🐙 ⊕ inv(🪵 ⊕ 🐙)    [by inv]
Step 10: 🐙 ⊕ inv(🪵 ⊕ 🐙) = 🐙 ⊕ (inv(🪵) ⊕ inv(🐙))    [by distribution property of inv]
Step 11: 🐙 ⊕ (inv(🪵) ⊕ inv(🐙)) = 🐙 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🧿)    [by inv]
Step 12: 🐙 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🧿) = 🐙 ⊕ 🪵    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: 🐙 ⊕ 🪵 = 🪈    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{\🪈}

Step 5: (🪵 ⊛ (inv(🪨) ⊗ 🪬)) = (🪵 ⊛ (🍄 ⊗ 🪬))    [by inv]
Step 6: (🪵 ⊛ (🍄 ⊗ 🪬)) = (🪵 ⊛ 🪬)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 7: (🪵 ⊛ 🪬) = inv(🪵 ⊗ 🪬)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: inv(🪵 ⊗ 🪬) = inv(🪺)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: inv(🪺) = 🪬    [by inv]

\boxed{🪬}

Step 6: (🧄 ⊛ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨))) = (🧄 ⊛ inv(🧁))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 7: (🧄 ⊛ inv(🧁)) = (🧄 ⊛ 🧄)    [by inv]
Step 8: (🧄 ⊛ 🧄) = inv(🧄 ⊕ 🧄)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv(🧄 ⊕ 🧄) = inv(🧊)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: inv(🧊) = 🪨    [by inv]

\boxed{🪨}

Step 6: (🐙 ⊗ ((🧁 ⊛ 🧊) ⊕ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊))) = (🐙 ⊗ (inv(🧁 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🐙 ⊗ (inv(🧁 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊))) = (🐙 ⊗ (inv(🧶) ⊕ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🐙 ⊗ (inv(🧶) ⊕ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊))) = (🐙 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊)))    [by inv]
Step 9: (🐙 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊))) = (🐙 ⊗ 🧁) ⊕ (🐙 ⊗ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊))    [by distribution property]
Step 10: (🐙 ⊗ 🧁) ⊕ (🐙 ⊗ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊)) = 🧊 ⊕ (🐙 ⊗ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: 🧊 ⊕ (🐙 ⊗ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊)) = 🧊 ⊕ inv(🐙 ⊗ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 12: 🧊 ⊕ inv(🐙 ⊗ (🧁 ⊗ 🧊)) = 🧊 ⊕ inv(inv(🐙) ⊗ inv(🧁 ⊗ 🧊))    [by distribution property]
Step 13: 🧊 ⊕ inv(inv(🐙) ⊗ inv(🧁 ⊗ 🧊)) = 🧊 ⊕ (inv(inv(🐙)) ⊗ inv(inv(🧁 ⊗ 🧊)))    [by distribution property]
Step 14: 🧊 ⊕ (inv(inv(🐙)) ⊗ inv(inv(🧁 ⊗ 🧊))) = 🧊 ⊕ (🐙 ⊗ inv(inv(🧁 ⊗ 🧊)))    [by inv]
Step 15: 🧊 ⊕ (🐙 ⊗ inv(inv(🧁 ⊗ 🧊))) = 🧊 ⊕ (🐙 ⊗ inv(🧁 ⊕ 🧊))    [by inv]
Step 16: 🧊 ⊕ (🐙 ⊗ inv(🧁 ⊕ 🧊)) = 🧊 ⊕ (🐙 ⊗ 🧶)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 17: 🧊 ⊕ (🐙 ⊗ 🧶) = 🧊 ⊕ 🦎    [by ⊗ table]
Step 18: 🧊 ⊕ 🦎 = 🦎    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🦎}

Step 6: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ inv(🪼))) = (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ 🫧))    [by transformation inv]
Step 7: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ 🫧)) = (🪩 ⊗ inv((🪣 ⊗ 🫧)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: (🪩 ⊗ inv((🪣 ⊗ 🫧))) = (🪩 ⊗ inv(🧶))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪩 ⊗ inv(🧶)) = (🪩 ⊗ 🪣)    [by transformation inv]
Step 10: (🪩 ⊗ 🪣) = 🫧    [by ⊗ table]

\boxed{🫧}

Step 6: (🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊕ (🍄 ⊛ 🦔))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🍄 ⊛ 🦔))    [by distribution property of ⊕]
Step 7: (🥟 ⊕ (🍄 ⊛ 🦔)) = (🥟 ⊕ ((🍄 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ 🍄))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: (🥟 ⊕ ((🍄 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ 🍄)) = (🥟 ⊕ (🫧 ⊗ 🍄))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🥟 ⊕ (🫧 ⊗ 🍄)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🐌)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: (🥟 ⊕ 🐌) = 🫧    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🫧}

Step 4: (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ (🪣 ⊕ 🪣))) = (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ 🪣))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ 🪣)) = ((🦔 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ (🥟 ⊕ 🪣))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 6: ((🦔 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ (🥟 ⊕ 🪣)) = (🦔 ⊗ (🥟 ⊕ 🪣))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 7: (🦔 ⊗ (🥟 ⊕ 🪣)) = (🦔 ⊗ 🦔)    [by distribution property of ⊗]
Step 8: (🦔 ⊗ 🦔) = 🦔    [by ⊗ table]

\boxed{🦔}

Step 6: (🧶 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ inv(🫐))) = (🧶 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈))    [by inv]
Step 7: (🧶 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈)) = (inv((🧶 ⊗ 🪈)) ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: (inv((🧶 ⊗ 🪈)) ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈)) = (inv(🪩) ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (inv(🪩) ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈)) = (🫐 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈))    [by inv]
Step 10: (🫐 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈)) = inv((🧶 ⊗ 🪈) ⊕ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈))    [by distribution property of ⊛]
Step 11: (inv((🧶 ⊗ 🪈) ⊕ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈))) = inv(🧶 ⊗ 🪈) ⊕ inv(🧶 ⊗ 🪈)    [by distribution property of ⊛]
Step 12: inv(🧶 ⊗ 🪈) ⊕ inv(🧶 ⊗ 🪈) = 🪩 ⊕ 🪩    [by inv and ⊗ table]
Step 13: 🪩 ⊕ 🪩 = 🪈    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🪈}

Step 5: (🧁 ⊗ (🐙 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🧁))) = (🧁 ⊗ (inv(🐙 ⊕ 🧁)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 6: (🧁 ⊗ (inv(🐙 ⊕ 🧁))) = (🧁 ⊗ (inv(🫧)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🧁 ⊗ (inv(🫧))) = (🧁 ⊗ 🧁)    [by inv]
Step 8: (🧁 ⊗ 🧁) = 🐙    [by ⊗ table]

\boxed{🐙}

Step 9: (🪤 ⊛ (inv((🪨 ⊛ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (inv((🪤 ⊕ (inv((🪨 ⊛ 🐌)))) ⊗ 🪭))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (inv((🪤 ⊕ (inv((🪨 ⊛ 🐌)))) ⊗ 🪭)) = (inv((🪤 ⊕ (inv(🫑))) ⊗ 🪭))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: (inv((🪤 ⊕ (inv(🫑))) ⊗ 🪭)) = (inv((🪤 ⊕ 🐌) ⊗ 🪭))    [by inv]
Step 12: (inv((🪤 ⊕ 🐌) ⊗ 🪭)) = (inv(🪤) ⊗ inv(🪭))    [by distribution property of inv]
Step 13: (inv(🪤) ⊗ inv(🪭)) = 🪭 ⊗ 🦎    [by inv]
Step 14: 🪭 ⊗ 🦎 = 🪨    [by ⊗ table]

\boxed{🪨}

Step 8: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot((🐌 ⊗ 🧊)))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪸))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪸)))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑))    [by rot table]
Step 10: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊕ 🫑)))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 11: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊕ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(🧊))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: (🪆 ⊗ rot(🧊)) = (🪆 ⊗ 🪆)    [by rot table]
Step 13: (🪆 ⊗ 🪆) = 🫑    [by ⊗ table]

\boxed{🫑}

Step 9: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ rot(🧁)))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ rot(🧁))))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ rot(🧁)))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🐙)))    [by rot]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊗ 🐙)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(🫧))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (🪵 ⊞ rot(🫧)) = (🪵 ⊞ 🪵)    [by rot]
Step 14: (🪵 ⊞ 🪵) = inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪵)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪵) = inv(🫧)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: inv(🫧) = 🪵    [by inv]

\boxed{🪵}

Step 9: rot((🪆 ⊗ ((((🪣 ⊗ 🪸) ⊛ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ ((🪈 ⊛ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: rot((🪆 ⊗ ((🪈 ⊛ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪈 ⊗ 🪈) ⊗ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 11: rot((🪆 ⊗ ((🪈 ⊛ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ ((🪈 ⊗ 🪈) ⊗ 🪈) ⊕ 🪈)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: rot((🪆 ⊗ ((🪈 ⊗ 🪈) ⊗ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ (🪈 ⊗ 🪈)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: rot((🪆 ⊗ (🪈 ⊗ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ 🪈))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 14: rot((🪆 ⊗ 🪈)) = rot(🪸)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 15: rot(🪸) = 🪆    [by rot transformation]

\boxed{🪆}

Step 8: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊞ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊕ 🪵))))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 9: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊕ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🪈)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🪈))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊕ 🪈)))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 11: inv(rot((🪭 ⊕ 🪈))) = inv(rot(🫐))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: inv(rot(🫐)) = inv(🫑)    [by rot]
Step 13: inv(🫑) = 🪵    [by inv]

\boxed{🪵}

Step 8: (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by inv]
Step 9: (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(( (🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (🦎 ⊗ rot(( (🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot((🧿 ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: (🦎 ⊗ rot((🧿 ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(🧿 ⊕ 🌵))    [by inv]
Step 12: (🦎 ⊗ rot(🧿 ⊕ 🌵)) = (🦎 ⊗ (rot(🧿) ⊕ rot(🌵)))    [by distribution of rot]
Step 13: (🦎 ⊗ (rot(🧿) ⊕ rot(🌵))) = (🦎 ⊗ (🧿 ⊕ 🧶))    [by rot]
Step 14: (🦎 ⊗ (🧿 ⊕ 🧶)) = (🦎 ⊗ 🧿) ⊕ (🦎 ⊗ 🧶)    [by distribution of ⊗]
Step 15: (🦎 ⊗ 🧿) ⊕ (🦎 ⊗ 🧶) = 🪻 ⊕ 🪈    [by ⊗ table]
Step 16: 🪻 ⊕ 🪈 = 🧿    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🧿}

Step 9: (rot((🥟 ⊕ 🪬)) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (rot(🧊) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: (rot(🧊) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🪬 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by rot]
Step 11: (🪬 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = ((🪬 ⊕ 🪬) ⊕ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 12: ((🪬 ⊕ 🪬) ⊕ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🥟 ⊕ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: (🥟 ⊕ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🥟 ⊕ inv((rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))))    [by rot distribution]
Step 14: (🥟 ⊕ inv((rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))) = (🥟 ⊕ inv((🥟 ⊗ 🪭) ⊕ 🥟))    [by rot table]
Step 15: (🥟 ⊕ inv((🥟 ⊗ 🪭) ⊕ 🥟)) = (🥟 ⊕ inv(🪈))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 16: (🥟 ⊕ inv(🪈)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🪬)    [by inv]
Step 17: (🥟 ⊕ 🪬) = 🧊    [by ⊕ table]

\boxed{🧊}
